name: Muscle-Up Clean Ladder
description: Eight rounds of bar muscle-ups and heavy cleans.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2017/9 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; clean load increases each round: 225-245-265-285-305-320-335-350 lb (men), 145-160-175-190-205-215-225-235 lb (women)
